title: Random Invoice Generator
subtitle: Generate random invoice data for Windsurf and Cursor invoice templates
noInvoiceDesc: Please enter an email address above, then click "Generate New Invoice" button to start creating a random invoice
randomDataDesc: Automatically generates invoice numbers, receipt numbers, payment methods, billing information, and billing dates
pdfExportDesc: Click "Print/Save PDF" button to save the invoice as a PDF file
templatesDesc: Supports both Windsurf and Cursor invoice templates, maintaining original styles and layouts

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
